---
title: "Lynda M. Kellam"
image: "images/profile.JPG"
about: 
  template: trestles
  links: 
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/lyndamk/
    - text: bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/lyndamk.bsky.social
    - text: orcid
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3263-859X
      
---

## Welcome!

I am a librarian, data rescuer, and historian. And I row.

This site is a work in progress as we all are. I created this as part of the [Penn State Open Scholarship Bootcamp 2025](https://penn-state-open-science.github.io/bootcamp-2025/), which included a workshop on [Quarto](https://quarto.org).

<a href="https://www.libraryjournal.com/story/lynda-kellam-movers-shakers-2026-community-builders)" target="_blank">
  <img src="images/2026_LJ_Digital_MoversandShakersBadge.png" alt="LJ Mover & Shaker" style="width:30%; display:block; margin-right:auto;">
</a>
